title: Viking Therapeutics Reports Third Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Viking Therapeutics third quarter 2024 net loss was $24.9 million or $0.22 per share. R&D expenses were $22.8 million, and G&A expenses were $13.8 million. For nine months of 2024, net loss was $74.5 million or $0.69 per share, with R&D expenses reaching $70.7 million and G&A expenses at $34.0 million. Cash position stood at $930 million as of September 30, 2024. The Phase 2 VENTURE trial of VK2735 showed patients achieved statistically significant reductions in body weight up to 14.7%, with favorable safety outcomes. An End-of-Phase 2 FDA meeting was planned for Q4 2024, and oral formulation Phase 2 initiation was expected in Q4. The Phase 2b VOYAGE study of VK2809 demonstrated NASH/MASH resolution rates ranging from 63% to 75% versus 29% for placebo in patients with fibrosis. Phase 1b results in X-ALD patients showed the compound was safe and well-tolerated with significant reductions in very long-chain fatty acids. Cash and short-term investments increased substantially from $362 million at end of 2023 to $930 million at quarter-end, positioning the company for multiple clinical milestones.
